description: Canonical lifecycle state definitions for governed artifacts in the spectrum-systems ecosystem.

states.label: Input
states.description: Raw or upstream artifact consumed by a governed engine or pipeline. Has not yet been transformed.

states.label: Transformed
states.description: A governed engine has processed the input and produced a structured output artifact.

states.label: Evaluated
states.description: The artifact has been evaluated against governed criteria. action_required has been set.

states.label: Action Required
states.description: Evaluation determined that a follow-up work item is required. A work item must exist.

states.label: In Progress
states.description: A work item has been accepted and active remediation is underway.

states.label: Resolved
states.description: The work item has been completed and the artifact has been remediated.

states.label: Re-evaluated
states.description: The artifact has been evaluated again after resolution. May loop back to action_required or close.

states.label: Closed
states.description: No action required and evaluation is complete, or re-evaluation confirmed resolution.
